name: python3-libfvde
title: python3-libfvde
summary: FileVault Drive Encryption access library -- Python 3 bindings
description:
FileVault Drive Encryption access library -- Python 3 bindings
The FVDE format is used by Mac OS X, as of Lion, to encrypt data on a
storage media volume.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libfvde.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-libfvde because FileVault Drive Encryption access library -- Python 3 bindings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-libfvde as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-libfvde with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-libfvde --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
